---
title: "The Rev. Canon Thomas Thellusson Carter"
---

## The Rev. Canon Thomas Thellusson Carter

**Dates:** (1808-1901)

### Description

Rector of Clewer and founder of the Clewer sisterhood, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1867)

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Feb 26[or8?] 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
